debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn✝ : 2 ≤ n
points : Fin n → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2) × EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
hpoints : ∀ (i : Fin n), (points i).1 ≠ (points i).2
interAlong : Fin n → Fin (n - 1) ↪o ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)
interBtw : (i : Fin n) → { j // i ≠ j } ≃ Fin (n - 1)
lineMap_eq_iff :
  ∀ (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) (ri rj : ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)),
    (lineMap (points i).1 (points i).2) ↑ri = (lineMap (points j).1 (points j).2) ↑rj ↔
      ri = (interAlong i) ((interBtw i) ⟨j, hij⟩) ∧ rj = (interAlong j) ((interBtw j) ⟨i, ⋯⟩)
clap : Bool → Fin (n - 1) → Fin (n - 1)
clap_def : ∀ (b : Bool), clap b = if b = true then Fin.rev else _root_.id
hn : Odd n
⊢ ∃ F,
    ∀ (f g : Fin n),
      f ≠ g →
        (F f).1 ≠ (F g).1 ∧
          ∀ (t : Fin (n - 1)),
            (lineMap (points (F f).1).1 (points (F f).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F f).1) (clap (F f).2 t)) ≠
              (lineMap (points (F g).1).1 (points (F g).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F g).1) (clap (F g).2 t))

failed_attempts:
classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hne : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have hne' : (g : Fin n) ≠ f := hfg.symm
    have hf : (interAlong f) (clap false t) = (interAlong f) t := by
      simp [clap_def]
    have hg : (interAlong g) (clap false t) = (interAlong g) t := by
      simp [clap_def]
    intro heq
    have heq' :
        lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hne⟩)).1 =
        lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hne'⟩)).1 := by
      simpa [hf, hg] using heq
    have ht :
        ((interAlong f) t : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hne⟩) ∧
        ((interAlong g) t : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) = (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hne'⟩) := by
      (simpa using (lineMap_eq_iff f g hne ((interAlong f) t) ((interAlong g) t)).1 heq')
    have : (t : Fin (n - 1 : ℕ)) = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hne⟩ := by
      exact (interAlong f).injective ht.1
    have : (t : Fin (n - 1 : ℕ)) = (interBtw g) ⟨f, hne'⟩ := by
      exact (interAlong g).injective ht.2
    exact False.elim (hne ((interBtw f).injective (this.trans this.symm)))

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, (i.1 % 2 = 0)), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · exact congrArg Prod.fst (by
      have : (f, (f.1 % 2 = 0)) ≠ (g, (g.1 % 2 = 0)) := by
        intro h; exact hfg (by simpa using congrArg Prod.fst h)
      by_contra h; exact this (by cases f <;> cases g <;> cases h; rfl))
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f, (f.1 % 2 = 0)) = (g, (g.1 % 2 = 0)) → False := by
      intro h; exact hfg (by simpa using congrArg Prod.fst h)
    have hseg' : f ≠ g := hfg
    -- Different segments cannot share an intersection point by `lineMap_eq_iff`.
    intro hEq
    have : ((interAlong f) (clap (f.1 % 2 = 0) t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
        interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, hseg'⟩) := by
      have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg'
          ((interAlong f) (clap (f.1 % 2 = 0) t)) ((interAlong g) (clap (g.1 % 2 = 0) t))).1 hEq
      exact this.1
    have : (clap (f.1 % 2 = 0) t) = interBtw f ⟨g, hseg'⟩ := by
      exact (interAlong f).injective this
    have : g = f := by
      -- From the bijection `interBtw f`, the index `interBtw f ⟨g, _⟩` determines `g`.
      have := congrArg ((interBtw f).symm) this
      -- simplify the left side
      simpa using congrArg Subtype.val (by
        -- `((interBtw f).symm (interBtw f ⟨g, _⟩)) = ⟨g, _⟩`
        simpa using (by
          have := (interBtw f).left_inv ⟨g, hseg'⟩
          exact this))
    exact hseg' (this.symm)

  refine ⟨fun i => (i, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg

    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have hseg' : (g : Fin n) ≠ f := hfg.symm
    have hf : (interAlong f) (clap false t) = (interAlong f) (clap false t) := rfl
    have hg : (interAlong g) (clap false t) = (interAlong g) (clap false t) := rfl
    have hclap : clap false = (id : Fin (n - 1) → Fin (n - 1)) := by
      simpa [clap_def]
    have ht' :
        lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1 =
        lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1 → False := by
      intro hEq
      have hEq' :
          lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1 =
          lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1 := hEq
      have hiff :=
        (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg ((interAlong f) (clap false t)) ((interAlong g) (clap false t)))
      have hconj : ((interAlong f) (clap false t) = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩)) ∧
          ((interAlong g) (clap false t) = (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg'⟩)) := by
        simpa using (hiff.mp hEq')
      have : (clap false t) = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩ := by
        apply (interAlong f).injective
        simpa using hconj.1
      have : (clap false t) = (interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg'⟩ := by
        apply (interAlong g).injective
        simpa using hconj.2
      exact False.elim (False.intro)
    exact fun hEq => (by
      have hiff :=
        (lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg ((interAlong f) (clap false t)) ((interAlong g) (clap false t))).1 hEq
      have : f = g := by
        have := congrArg (fun x => (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩)) rfl
        exact (Fin.ne_iff_vne).1 hfg
      exact (hfg this).elim)

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, true), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ (g : Fin n) := hfg
    have hseg' : (g : Fin n) ≠ (f : Fin n) := hfg.symm
    have ht : (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 = (interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩)).1 := by
      simpa [clap_def] using congrArg Subtype.val (congrArg (fun x => (interAlong f x)) (by
        simpa using (Fin.rev_inj.mp rfl)))
    -- Use `lineMap_eq_iff` to characterize equality as being the unique intersection point.
    by_contra hEq
    have hEq' :
        lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 =
        lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 (interAlong g (clap true t)).1 := by
      simpa using hEq
    have hchar :=
      (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg
        ((interAlong f (clap true t)) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1)
        ((interAlong g (clap true t)) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1)).1 hEq'
    have hf :
        (interAlong f (clap true t)) = interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩) := by
      simpa using hchar.1
    have hg :
        (interAlong g (clap true t)) = interAlong g (interBtw g ⟨f, hseg'⟩) := by
      simpa using hchar.2
    -- `interAlong` is an embedding, so this forces the indices to be the intersection indices,
    -- contradicting the freedom of `t` (take `t` arbitrary).
    have : clap true t = interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩ := by
      exact (interAlong f).injective hf
    have : clap true t = interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩ := this
    -- But `t` was arbitrary; choose the specific `t` that disagrees by injectivity of `Fin.rev`.
    -- Contradiction by taking `t` mapped by `Fin.rev` again.
    have := congrArg Fin.rev this
    simpa [clap_def] using this

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => ⟨i, True⟩, ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hne : (⟨f, True⟩ : Fin n × Bool) ≠ ⟨g, True⟩ := by
      intro h
      exact hfg (by simpa using congrArg Prod.fst h)
    have : f ≠ g := hfg
    have hfgi : (⟨g, this⟩ : { j // f ≠ j }) := ⟨g, this⟩
    have hgfi : (⟨f, this.symm⟩ : { j // g ≠ j }) := ⟨f, this.symm⟩
    have hx :
        lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) (clap True t)).1 ≠
          lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) (clap True t)).1 := by
      intro hEq
      have hEq' :
          lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) (clap True t)).1 =
            lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) (clap True t)).1 := hEq
      have hiff :=
        (lineMap_eq_iff f g this ((interAlong f) (clap True t)) ((interAlong g) (clap True t))).1 hEq'
      rcases hiff with ⟨hri, hrj⟩
      have hb : clap True t = (interBtw f hfgi) := by
        have := congrArg (fun x => (interAlong f).toEquiv x) hri
        simpa using this
      have hb' : clap True t = (interBtw g hgfi) := by
        have := congrArg (fun x => (interAlong g).toEquiv x) hrj
        simpa using this
      have : (interBtw f hfgi) = (interBtw g hgfi) := by
        simpa [hb, hb'] using rfl
      -- impossible since `interBtw` is a bijection and sends distinct `j` to distinct indices
      have := congrArg (fun k => (interBtw f).symm k) this
      have : (interBtw f).symm ((interBtw f) hfgi) = (interBtw f).symm ((interBtw g) hgfi) := this
      simpa using this
    simpa [clap_def] using hx

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => ⟨i, true⟩, ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have hseg' : (⟨g, hseg.symm⟩ : {j // (f : Fin n) ≠ j}).1 = g := rfl
    have hseg'' : (⟨f, hseg⟩ : {j // (g : Fin n) ≠ j}).1 = f := rfl
    have hb : clap true t = Fin.rev t := by simpa [clap_def]
    have hb' : clap true t = Fin.rev t := hb
    -- use the characterization of intersections: equality implies matching indices, hence f=g
    intro heq
    have heq' :
        lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) (clap true t)).1 =
        lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) (clap true t)).1 := by
          simpa using heq
    have hiff := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg ((interAlong f) (clap true t)) ((interAlong g) (clap true t))).1 heq'
    have hf :
        (interAlong f) (clap true t) = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) := by
          simpa [and_left_comm, and_assoc] using hiff.1
    have hg :
        (interAlong g) (clap true t) = (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg.symm⟩) := by
          simpa [and_left_comm, and_assoc] using hiff.2
    have hf' := (interAlong f).injective hf
    have hg' := (interAlong g).injective hg
    have : (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩ = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩ := rfl
    -- derive a contradiction by forcing g=f from the uniqueness of the intersection labels
    have : (⟨g, hseg⟩ : {j // (f : Fin n) ≠ j}) = ⟨f, by simpa using hseg⟩ := by
      have := congrArg (fun x => (interBtw f).symm x) hf'
      simpa using this
    exact hseg (by simpa using congrArg Subtype.val this)

  refine ⟨fun i => ⟨i, True⟩, ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have hseg' : (g : Fin n) ≠ f := hfg.symm
    have hf :
        ((interAlong f) (clap True t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
          (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) := by
      simp [clap_def, Fin.rev, hn]
    have hg :
        ((interAlong g) (clap True t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
          (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg'⟩) := by
      simp [clap_def, Fin.rev, hn]
    intro heq
    have : ((interAlong f) (clap True t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
        (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) ∧
      ((interAlong g) (clap True t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
        (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg'⟩) := by
      exact ⟨hf, hg⟩
    have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg
      ((interAlong f) (clap True t)) ((interAlong g) (clap True t))).1 heq
    exact (by
      have : ((interAlong f) (clap True t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
          (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) := (this.1)
      have : ((interAlong g) (clap True t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
          (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg'⟩) := (this.2)
      exact False.elim (by
        -- `t` is arbitrary; we can pick `t` so that `clap True t` is not the fixed intersection,
        -- but in this abstract setup we use injectivity of `interAlong` instead.
        have hinj : Function.Injective (interAlong f) := (interAlong f).injective
        have hinj' : Function.Injective (interAlong g) := (interAlong g).injective
        have : clap True t = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩ := hinj this
        have : clap True t = (interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg'⟩ := hinj' this
        -- Contradiction because `interBtw` is a bijection and would force `f = g`.
        have : (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩ = (interBtw f) ⟨f, by simpa using (Ne.rfl : f ≠ f)⟩ := by
          simpa [this] using rfl
        exact (hseg (by
          -- use injectivity of `interBtw f` on the `Subtype` argument
          have hinjB : Function.Injective (interBtw f) := (interBtw f).injective
          have := congrArg Subtype.val (hinjB this)
          simpa using this )))) )

        have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg (interAlong f (clap true t)) (interAlong g (clap true t))).1 h
        simpa using this

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨by simpa using hfg, ?_⟩
  intro t
  have hne : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
  have hne' : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
  have hline :
      lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1 =
      lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1 →
      False := by
        intro hEq
        have hEq' :
            lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1 =
            lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1 := hEq
        have hiff :=
          (lineMap_eq_iff f g hne ((interAlong f) (clap false t)) ((interAlong g) (clap false t))).1 hEq'
        rcases hiff with ⟨hf, hg⟩
        have hf' : (interBtw f ⟨g, hne⟩) = (clap false t) := by
          exact (interAlong f).injective hf
        have hg' : (interBtw g ⟨f, hne.symm⟩) = (clap false t) := by
          exact (interAlong g).injective hg
        have : (interBtw f ⟨g, hne⟩) = (interBtw f ⟨f, by simpa using hne⟩) := by
          simpa [hf'] using congrArg (fun x => x) (hf'.trans (by symm; exact hf'))
        exact False.elim (by
          have : g = f := by
            have := (interBtw f).injective (by
              simpa [Subtype.ext_iff] using this)
            simpa using this
          exact hne (this.symm))
  intro hEq
  exact (hline hEq).elim

    by_contra hEq
    have hEq' :
        lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 =
        lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 (interAlong g (clap true t)).1 := by
      simpa using hEq
    have hfgn : f ≠ g := hfg
    have hclap : clap true t = Fin.rev t := by
      simpa [clap_def]
    have hri :
        (interAlong f (clap true t)) =
          interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, hfgn⟩) := by
      have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hfgn (interAlong f (clap true t)) (interAlong g (clap true t))).1 hEq'
      exact this.1
    have : (interAlong f (clap true t)) = (interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, hfgn⟩)) := hri
    exact (ne_of_eq_of_ne (by simpa [hclap] using this) (by
      exact (interAlong f).injective.ne (by
        simpa [hclap] using congrArg (fun x => x) this))) rfl

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, true), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have hseg' : ((fun i => (i, true)) f).1 ≠ ((fun i => (i, true)) g).1 := by simpa using hseg
    have ht : (clap true t) = Fin.rev t := by
      simpa [clap_def]
    have ht' : (clap true t) = Fin.rev t := ht
    have hcontra :
        (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2) ((interAlong f) (clap true t)).1 =
          (lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2) ((interAlong g) (clap true t)).1 → False := by
      intro heq
      have hiff :=
        (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg ((interAlong f) (clap true t)) ((interAlong g) (clap true t))).1 ?_
      · exact False.elim (by
          have : ((interAlong f) (clap true t)) = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) :=
            hiff.1
          have : (clap true t) = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩ := by
            exact (interAlong f).injective this
          exact (Fin.ne_of_lt (Fin.rev_lt_self_iff.2 (by
            have := (Fin.isLT t)
            exact this))).elim this)
      · simpa using heq
    intro heq
    exact hcontra heq

classical
  refine ⟨fun f => (f, true), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨hfg, ?_⟩
  intro t
  have hij : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
  have hiff :=
    (lineMap_eq_iff f g hij ((interAlong f) (clap true t)) ((interAlong g) (clap true t))).not
  intro hEq
  have : ((interAlong f) (clap true t)) = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hij⟩) ∧
      ((interAlong g) (clap true t)) = (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hij.symm⟩) := by
    have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hij ((interAlong f) (clap true t)) ((interAlong g) (clap true t))).1 hEq
    simpa using this
  have hf : clap true t = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hij⟩ := by
    exact (interAlong f).injective this.1
  have hg : clap true t = (interBtw g) ⟨f, hij.symm⟩ := by
    exact (interAlong g).injective this.2
  have : (interBtw f) ⟨g, hij⟩ = (interBtw f) ⟨f, by simpa using hij⟩ := by
    simpa [hf] using congrArg (fun x => x) (by rfl : clap true t = clap true t)
  exact (hij (by
    have := (interBtw f).injective this
    simpa using congrArg Subtype.val this))

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t hEq
    have hEq' :
        lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1 =
        lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1 := hEq
    have hf_g : f ≠ g := hfg
    have ht_inj : (interAlong f) (clap false t) = (interAlong g) (clap false t) := by
      have ht0 : clap false t = t := by
        simpa [clap_def]
      have hf :
          (interAlong f) (clap false t) = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hf_g⟩) := by
        have : ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1 =
            ((interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hf_g⟩)).1 := by
          have hri :
              (⟨((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1, ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).2⟩ :
                Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hf_g⟩) := by
            have hri' :
                (⟨((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1, ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).2⟩ :
                  Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
                (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hf_g⟩) ∧
                (⟨((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1, ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).2⟩ :
                  Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
                (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hf_g.symm⟩) := by
              have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hf_g
                ⟨((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1, ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).2⟩
                ⟨((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1, ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).2⟩).1 ?_
              · simpa using this
              · simpa using hEq'
            exact hri'.1
          simpa using congrArg Subtype.val hri
        exact by
          apply (interAlong f).injective
          simpa [Subtype.ext_iff] using this
      have hg :
          (interAlong g) (clap false t) = (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hf_g.symm⟩) := by
        have : ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1 =
            ((interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hf_g.symm⟩)).1 := by
          have hrj :
              (⟨((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1, ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).2⟩ :
                Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
                (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hf_g⟩) ∧
              (⟨((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1, ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).2⟩ :
                Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
                (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hf_g.symm⟩) := by
            have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hf_g
              ⟨((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1, ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).2⟩
              ⟨((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1, ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).2⟩).1 ?_
            · simpa using this
            · simpa using hEq'
          exact by simpa using congrArg Subtype.val hrj.2
        exact by
          apply (interAlong g).injective
          simpa [Subtype.ext_iff] using this
      have hfval : (interBtw f ⟨g, hf_g⟩) = (clap false t) := by
        have : (interAlong f) (interBtw f ⟨g, hf_g⟩) = (interAlong f) (clap false t) := by
          simpa [hf] using (rfl : (interAlong f) (clap false t) = (interAlong f) (clap false t))
        exact (interAlong f).injective this
      have hgval : (interBtw g ⟨f, hf_g.symm⟩) = (clap false t) := by
        have : (interAlong g) (interBtw g ⟨f, hf_g.symm⟩) = (interAlong g) (clap false t) := by
          simpa [hg] using (rfl : (interAlong g) (clap false t) = (interAlong g) (clap false t))
        exact (interAlong g).injective this
      have : (interAlong f) (interBtw f ⟨g, hf_g⟩) = (interAlong g) (interBtw g ⟨f, hf_g.symm⟩) := by
        -- both sides are the unique intersection point of segments f and g
        have hfg' :=
          (lineMap_eq_iff f g hf_g
            (interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, hf_g⟩))
            (interAlong g (interBtw g ⟨f, hf_g.symm⟩))).2 ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
        simpa using congrArg (fun x => (⟨x, (interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, hf_g⟩)).2⟩ :
          Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1)) (by rfl)
      simpa [hfval, hgval] using this
    have : f = g := by
      have : (interBtw f) ⟨g, hf_g⟩ = (interBtw f) ⟨f, by simpa using (ne_of_eq_of_ne rfl hf_g)⟩ := by
        simpa using congrArg (fun x => (interBtw f) x) (Subtype.ext (by simpa))
      exact False.elim (hf_g (by simpa))
    exact (hfg this)

classical
  refine ⟨fun f => (f, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t ht
    exact (hfg (Prod.ext (by simpa using ht) rfl))

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, true), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t ht
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have hseg' : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    -- use the characterization of intersections to show equal positions would force f=g
    intro heq
    have : False := by
      have hiff :=
        (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg (interAlong f (clap true t)) (interAlong g (clap true t))).1 ?_
      · exact (hseg (by simpa using congrArg (fun x => (interBtw f).symm x) (by
          -- extract the forced identity of intersection labels
          have hf : (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) = interAlong f (clap true t) := by
            simpa using hiff.1
          have hg : (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg.symm⟩) = interAlong g (clap true t) := by
            simpa using hiff.2
          -- injectivity gives equality of indices; converting via equivalence gives g = g, contradiction later
          have hfi : (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩ = clap true t := by
            exact (interAlong f).injective hf
          -- now map back to get g = g; then conclude f=g by uniqueness of element with this index
          -- since (interBtw f) is an equivalence, apply its injectivity on the subtype
          have : (⟨g, hseg⟩ : {j // f ≠ j}) = ⟨g, hseg'⟩ := by
            ext; rfl
          exact this)))) )
      · -- rewrite the equality into the required form for `lineMap_eq_iff`
        simpa [clap_def] using heq
    exact this.elim

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, True), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨by simpa using hfg, ?_⟩
  intro t
  -- If two such frogs meet at time `t`, then the corresponding segments meet at the same
  -- intersection point, which forces the segment indices to be equal.
  intro hEq
  have h' :
      (interAlong f) (clap True t) = (interAlong g) (clap True t) := by
    exact (interAlong f).injective (by simpa using hEq)
  have hfgi : f = g := by
    -- Use the intersection characterization with `ri = rj = interAlong _ (clap True t)`.
    have :
        (⟨(interAlong f) (clap True t), (interAlong f) (clap True t)).2⟩ =
          (⟨(interAlong g) (clap True t), (interAlong g) (clap True t)).2⟩ := by
      simpa using congrArg Subtype.val h'
    -- Now show the intersection with the same parameter forces equality of indices.
    -- Pick `ri` and `rj` accordingly and apply `lineMap_eq_iff`.
    have hiff := (lineMap_eq_iff f g (by exact hfg) ((interAlong f) (clap True t)) ((interAlong g) (clap True t)))
    have : ((interAlong f) (clap True t)) = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hfg⟩) ∧
        ((interAlong g) (clap True t)) = (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩) := by
      -- from equality of points
      have := (hiff.mp (by simpa using hEq))
      simpa using this
    -- From injectivity of `interAlong`, deduce the indices correspond.
    have ht1 : clap True t = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hfg⟩ := by
      exact (interAlong f).injective (this.1)
    -- But `clap True t` is fixed, so the corresponding `g` is determined; hence `f=g`.
    -- Use bijectivity of `interBtw f` on `{j // f ≠ j}`.
    -- If `f ≠ g`, contradiction with `ht1` when applying inverse to both sides.
    by_contra hne
    exact hne (by rfl)
  exact (hfg (by simpa using hfgi))

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    -- use `lineMap_eq_iff` with the two relevant intersection parameters
    have hiff :=
      (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg
        ((interAlong f) (clap false t))
        ((interAlong g) (clap false t)))
    have hne : ¬(((interAlong f) (clap false t)) = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) ∧
        ((interAlong g) (clap false t)) = (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg.symm⟩)) := by
      intro h
      have hf : clap false t = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩ := by
        have := congrArg (fun x => (interAlong f).toEmbedding.inj x) h.1
        simpa using this
      have hg : clap false t = (interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg.symm⟩ := by
        have := congrArg (fun x => (interAlong g).toEmbedding.inj x) h.2
        simpa using this
      have hrefl : (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩ = (interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg.symm⟩ := by
        simpa [hf, hg]
      exact (Fin.ne_iff_vne.mp (by simpa using hrefl)).elim
    have : (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2) ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1 ≠
        (lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2) ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1 := by
      intro heq
      have : ((interAlong f) (clap false t)) =
            (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) ∧
          ((interAlong g) (clap false t)) =
            (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg.symm⟩) := (hiff.mp heq)
      exact hne this
    simpa [clap_def] using this

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, False), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ (g : Fin n) := hfg
    have hseg' : ( (fun i : Fin n => (i, False)) f).1 ≠ ((fun i : Fin n => (i, False)) g).1 := by
      simpa using hseg
    have : (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2) ((interAlong f) (clap False t)) =
        (lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2) ((interAlong g) (clap False t)) → False := by
      intro hEq
      have hclap : clap False = (id : Fin (n - 1 : ℕ) → Fin (n - 1 : ℕ)) := by
        simpa [clap_def] using congrArg (fun f => f) (clap_def False)
      have hEq' :
          (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2) ((interAlong f) t) =
          (lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2) ((interAlong g) t) := by
        simpa [hclap] using hEq
      have hiff :=
        (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg ((interAlong f) t) ((interAlong g) t))
      rcases (hiff.1 hEq') with ⟨hf, hg⟩
      have ht1 : t = (interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩) := by
        exact (interAlong f).injective hf
      have ht2 : t = (interBtw g ⟨f, hseg.symm⟩) := by
        exact (interAlong g).injective hg
      have : interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩ = interBtw f ⟨f, by simpa using (ne_of_eq_of_ne rfl hseg)⟩ := by
        simpa [ht1] using congrArg (fun x => x) rfl
      exact False.elim (hseg rfl)
    exact by
      intro hEq
      exact (this hEq).elim

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    intro hEq
    have h' :=
      (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg ((interAlong f) (clap false t)) ((interAlong g) (clap false t))).1 hEq
    have : ((interAlong f) (clap false t)) = ((interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩)) := by
      simpa [h'.1]
    exact (ne_of_lt ((interAlong f).strictMono ((clap false t)).2 ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩).2))
      (by simpa using this)

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => ⟨i, true⟩, ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨by simpa using hfg, ?_⟩
  intro t ht
  have hfg' : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
  have h := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg' ((interAlong f) (clap true t)) ((interAlong g) (clap true t))).1
  intro hEq
  have hconj := h hEq
  have : (interAlong f) (clap true t) = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hfg'⟩) := by
    simpa using hconj.1
  have : clap true t = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hfg'⟩ := (interAlong f).injective this
  have hn1 : 1 ≤ n - 1 := Nat.pred_le_pred hn
  have htne : (t : ℕ) ≠ n - 1 := by
    exact Fin.ne_of_lt t.2
  have htne' : (Fin.rev t : ℕ) ≠ n - 1 := by
    simpa [Fin.rev, Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add_of_le, hn1] using htne
  have : (Fin.rev t : ℕ) = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hfg'⟩ := by
    simpa [clap_def] using this
  exact htne' (this.trans ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hfg'⟩).2)

classical
  refine ⟨fun f => (f, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t ht
    exfalso
    have hne : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have h := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hne
      ((interAlong f) (clap false t))
      ((interAlong g) (clap false t))).1 ht
    have : ((interAlong f) (clap false t)) =
        (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hne⟩) := h.1
    exact (show False from (interAlong f).injective this).elim

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, False), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have hseg' : (g : Fin n) ≠ f := hfg.symm
    have hclapF : clap False t = t := by
      simpa [clap_def] using congrArg (fun k => k t) (clap_def False)
    -- use the intersection characterization to force the unique intersection parameters
    intro hEq
    have hiff :=
      (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg ((interAlong f) t) ((interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg'⟩))).1 hEq
    -- from the iff, the parameter on segment f must be the one corresponding to g
    have ht :
        (interAlong f) t = (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) := by
      exact hiff.1
    have : t = (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩ := by
      exact (interAlong f).injective ht
    -- but then applying the characterization in the other direction forces a contradiction at time t
    -- since (interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩) is fixed while t varies; here we use hfg via uniqueness
    exact (Fin.ne_of_vne (by
      -- `t` cannot equal the fixed index for all `t`; contradiction comes from this particular `t`
      simpa [this] )).elim

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, true), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t ht
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have h' :
        ¬ (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) (clap true t)).1 =
            lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) (clap true t)).1) := by
      intro hEq
      have hEq' :
          (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2) ↑((interAlong f) (clap true t)) =
            (lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2) ↑((interAlong g) (clap true t)) := by
        simpa using hEq
      have hb : clap true t = Fin.rev t := by simpa [clap_def]
      have hf :
          ((interAlong f) (clap true t)) =
            (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) := by
        have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg ((interAlong f) (clap true t)) ((interAlong g) (clap true t))).1 hEq'
        exact this.1
      have hg :
          ((interAlong g) (clap true t)) =
            (interAlong g) ((interBtw g) ⟨f, hseg.symm⟩) := by
        have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg ((interAlong f) (clap true t)) ((interAlong g) (clap true t))).1 hEq'
        exact this.2
      have hfin : (clap true t) = (interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩) := by
        exact (interAlong f).injective hf
      have hfin' : (clap true t) = (interBtw g ⟨f, hseg.symm⟩) := by
        exact (interAlong g).injective hg
      -- this would force two distinct segments to have the same labeled intersection index
      -- on both segments simultaneously, contradicting the bijections `interBtw`
      have : (interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩) = (interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩) := rfl
      exact False.elim (by
        -- Extract contradiction from the impossible equality of segments via indices
        -- using that `interBtw f` is a bijection: if `(clap true t)` equals both sides, then
        -- the corresponding `j` must be the same; but here it is `g` vs itself, so we need a
        -- direct contradiction: use injectivity of `interBtw f` composed with `Subtype.ext`.
        -- Conclude by forcing `f = g` from `hfin` and `hfin'` after rewriting via `hb` and `Fin.rev_involutive`.
        have hb' : clap true t = Fin.rev t := by simpa [clap_def]
        -- Use involution of `Fin.rev` to get `t` from `clap true t`
        have ht' : t = Fin.rev (clap true t) := by
          -- `Fin.rev` is involutive
          simpa [hb', Fin.rev_rev] 
        -- Now show that the intersection index on `f` with `g` equals that with itself via `t`
        -- and similarly on `g`, forcing `f = g` by symmetry of `interBtw` (not available);
        -- instead, simply derive `False` from `hseg` by rewriting:
        exact hseg (by
          -- forced equality from `interBtw` bijection: since `interBtw f` is an equiv,
          -- `⟨g,hseg⟩ = ⟨f, by simpa using hseg.symm⟩` from `hfin` and `hfin'` after transporting
          -- along `Fin.rev` is not directly possible; so finish with `False` via `hseg` and `rfl`.
          simpa using (by
            -- unreachable, but enough for `simp` to close
            exact rfl)))
    exact h' ht

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => ⟨i, true⟩, ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t hEq
    have hEq' :
        lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ((interAlong f) (clap true t)).1 =
        lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 ((interAlong g) (clap true t)).1 := by
      simpa using hEq
    have hij : f ≠ g := hfg
    have hIoo_f : (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 ∈ Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1 :=
      (interAlong f (clap true t)).2
    have hIoo_g : (interAlong g (clap true t)).1 ∈ Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1 :=
      (interAlong g (clap true t)).2
    let ri : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1 := ⟨(interAlong f (clap true t)).1, hIoo_f⟩
    let rj : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1 := ⟨(interAlong g (clap true t)).1, hIoo_g⟩
    have hri : ((lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2) (ri.1)) =
        (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2) ((interAlong f (clap true t)).1) := rfl
    have hrj : ((lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2) (rj.1)) =
        (lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2) ((interAlong g (clap true t)).1) := rfl
    have hEq'' :
        (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2) (ri.1) =
        (lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2) (rj.1) := by
      simpa [hri, hrj] using hEq'
    have hiff := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hij ri rj).1 hEq''
    have hriEq : ri = interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, hij⟩) := hiff.1
    have hrjEq : rj = interAlong g (interBtw g ⟨f, hij.symm⟩) := hiff.2
    have hInj_f : clap true t = interBtw f ⟨g, hij⟩ := by
      apply (interAlong f).injective
      simpa [ri, hriEq]
    have hInj_g : clap true t = interBtw g ⟨f, hij.symm⟩ := by
      apply (interAlong g).injective
      simpa [rj, hrjEq]
    have : g = f := by
      apply Subtype.ext_iff.mp
      have := congrArg (fun x => (interBtw f x)) (by
        ext; simpa) ?_
      · simpa using (hij (by simpa using this))
      · exact False.elim (hij rfl)
    exact (hfg (this.symm))

classical
  refine ⟨fun f => (f, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have hseg' : (fun x : Fin n => x) f ≠ (fun x : Fin n => x) g := hfg
    have hne :
        (clap false t) ≠ (interBtw f ⟨g, hseg⟩) := by
      simpa [clap_def] using (Fin.ne_rev_self_of_odd hn (i := t))
    intro hEq
    have hEq' :
        (interAlong f) (clap false t) =
          (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) := by
      have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg
        ((interAlong f) (clap false t)) ((interAlong g) (clap false t))).1 hEq
      simpa using this.1
    exact hne ((interAlong f).injective hEq')

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have hinj : (interAlong f) (clap false t) ≠ (interAlong g) (clap false t) := by
      have : (interAlong f) (clap false t) = (interAlong g) (clap false t) := by
        intro h
        exact h
      exact fun h => by
        have hf : f = g := by
          have := congrArg (fun x => (interBtw f) ⟨g, hseg⟩) (by
            simpa [clap_def] using h)
          exact False.elim (hseg (by simpa using hf))
        exact hseg hf
    intro heq
    have : ((interAlong f) (clap false t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) =
        (interAlong g) (clap false t) := by
      apply Subtype.ext
      simpa using congrArg (fun x => (AffineMap.lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2) x) ?_
    · exact hinj this
    · apply Subtype.ext
      simpa [clap_def] using (by
        have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg ((interAlong f) (clap false t)) ((interAlong g) (clap false t))).1 ?_
        · exact this.1
        · simpa using heq)

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, true), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨by simpa using hfg, ?_⟩
  intro t
  have hseg : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
  have hne :
      (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 ≠ (interAlong g (clap true t)).1 := by
    have hinj : Function.Injective fun i : Fin n => (interAlong i (clap true t)).1 := by
      intro i j hij
      have hij' : i = j := by
        exact congrArg (fun x => (x : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1)) hij
      simpa using hij'
    exact fun h => hseg (hinj h)
  intro heq
  have : (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 = (interAlong g (clap true t)).1 := by
    have := congrArg (fun x => (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2) x) rfl
    -- use the characterization of intersections
    have hiff := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hseg ((interAlong f (clap true t))) ((interAlong g (clap true t)))).1
      (by simpa using heq)
    exact congrArg Subtype.val hiff.1
  exact hne this

classical
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, false), ?_⟩
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using hfg
  · intro t
    have hij : (f : Fin n) ≠ g := hfg
    have hfm :
        (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2)
            ((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1 =
          (lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2)
            ((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1 →
        False := by
          intro hEq
          have hEq' :
              (lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2)
                  (((interAlong f) (clap false t)).1) =
                (lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2)
                  (((interAlong g) (clap false t)).1) := hEq
          have hiff :=
            (lineMap_eq_iff f g hij ((interAlong f) (clap false t)) ((interAlong g) (clap false t))).1 hEq'
          have ht :
              (interAlong f) (clap false t) =
                (interAlong f) ((interBtw f) ⟨g, hij⟩) := by
              simpa [hiff.1] using rfl
          have :
              (clap false t : Fin (n - 1)) =
                (interBtw f) ⟨g, hij⟩ := by
              exact (interAlong f).injective ht
          have :=
            congrArg (fun x => (x : Fin (n - 1)).val) this
          exact (Nat.lt_irrefl _ (by
            have := (t.isLt)
            simpa using this)).elim
    exact by
      intro hEq
      exact hfm hEq
